title: Barr
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Youmay|the [[Clone Lieutenant/Legends|clone trooper lieutenant]]|the fallen [[Jedi]] [[Ferren Barr]]}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image=[[File:CloneTrooperBarr.png]] |name=Barr
CT-41/14-0301 |homeworld=[[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]{{DB|organization|clonetroopers|clone troopers}} |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] {{C|[[Cloning/Legends|clone]]}}{{InsiderCite|84|Guide to the Grand Army of the Republic}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns= |donor=[[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] |height=1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin=[[Color/Legends|Tan]] |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] **[[2nd Platoon]] |masters= |apprentices= }} '''Barr''', designated as '''CT-41/14-0301''', was a [[Clone Lieutenant/Legends|clone trooper lieutenant]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] who fought in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Barr was the leader of the [[2nd Platoon]] of the [[327th Star Corps/Legends|327th Star Corps's]] [[Bacta Company]]. The [[Platoon/Legends|platoon]] had four [[Squad/Legends|squads]] under Barr's command—a total of thirty-two men and four [[Medic/Legends|medics]]. ==Biography== [[File:Bly-Galle-Barr-Inc.png|thumb|left|200px|Barr, alongside Bly, Galle, and Inc, utilizing jetpacks to ambush battle droids.]] Born on the planet [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]] from the [[Clone template/Legends|genetic template]] of [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]], CT-41/14-0301 was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] created to serve the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] against the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. CT-41/14-0301 served in the [[327th Star Corps/Legends|327th Star Corps]] and eventually earned the nickname "Barr."''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' Early in the war, the 327th, led by [[Clone Commander/Legends|Clone Commander]] [[Bly/Legends|Bly]], attempted to reap information from the memory banks of a Confederate [[Unidentified T-series tactical droid (Aayla Secura's ambush)|tactical droid]], by setting up a trap in a [[Stone/Legends|rocky]] canyon. They were able to fabricate an information bunker, which attracted the attention of the [[T-series tactical droid/Legends|tactical droid]]. In turn, the droid ordered his troops to attack the bunker, prompting Barr and the men of the 327th to attack them from the rear. They charged in on [[Jetpack/Legends|jetpacks]] and began firing, with Commander Bly ordering Barr and [[Galle/Legends|Galle]] to take out the [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|super battle droids]]. They were able to effectively dispatch the tactical droid's troops, while [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]] beheaded the tactical droid. Since the droid had not gone into [[cyberostasis]], they would be able to plunder its memory banks for intel.''[[The Clone Wars: Headgames]]'' As the war continued, Barr was eventually promoted to the rank of [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]]. As a [[Clone Lieutenant/Legends|Clone Lieutenant]], Barr led the 327th's [[2nd Platoon]], which comprised of thirty-two clone troopers and four [[Clone medic/Legends|clone medics]] divided into four [[Squad/Legends|squads]]. Towards the war's end, Barr fought in the [[Battle of Felucia (Outer Rim Sieges)/Legends|Battle of Felucia]] and continued to serve under the command of Bly and alongside the now lieutenants Galle and Inc. During the battle, Barr accompanied Inc and [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Barriss Offee/Legends|Barriss Offee]] in an attempt to ambush a battle droid patrol. During the ambush, Inc's blaster goes into carbon flush, causing the clone to get killed. Getting overwhelmed, Offee ordered Barr to go get the rest of the squad. As Barr left to get help, the clones received [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], and when Barr returned with help, Galle ordered an [[All Terrain Tactical Enforcer/Legends|AT-TE]] to fire on Offee, killing her.''[[Reversal of Fortune]]'' ==Personality and traits== As a clone of Jango Fett, Barr stood at 1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall and had [[Color/Legends|tan]] skin. ==Equipment== During the Clone Wars, Barr wore [[Phase I clone trooper armor/Legends|Phase I clone trooper armor]] adorned with the yellow markings of the 327th Star Corps. During the [[Battle for the Galactic Republic information bunker|battle at the information bunker]], Barr utilized a jetpack and a [[DC-15A blaster rifle/Legends|DC-15A blaster rifle]]. Barr would eventually substitute their Phase I armor for [[Phase II clone trooper armor/Legends|Phase II clone trooper armor]], but kept the 327th's markings. While on Felucia, Barr wore a [[Pauldron/Legends|pauldron]] and a [[Kama/Legends|kama]], and used two [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistols]]. ==Appearances== *''[[The Clone Wars: Headgames]]'' *''[[Reversal of Fortune]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *{{InsiderCite|84|Guide to the Grand Army of the Republic}} {{1stm}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=CT-41/14-0301 |pl=CT-41/14-0301 }} [[Category:Clone trooper lieutenants]] [[Category:Individuals with unspecified pronouns]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Members of the 327th Star Corps]] [[Category:Members of the 2nd Platoon]]
